title: crucifera johannis
intro: Crucifera johannis, also known as Johannis wort or Cross of St. John, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the genus Hypericum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, due to the presence of hyperforin and hypericin. The health benefits of Crucifera johannis include reducing anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed as a supplement or used topically for wound healing and skin conditions.
